title: RouteDock Manifest
description: Discovery manifest served at /.well-known/routedock.json on every RouteDock provider endpoint

routedock.description: Manifest schema version. Always '1.0' for this version.

description.description: Human-readable description of the provider's data or service

modes.description: Payment modes supported by this provider

network.description: Stellar network this provider operates on

asset_contract.description: Stellar Asset Contract (SAC) address for the payment asset

pricing.description: Pricing configuration per supported payment mode

endpoints.description: Map of endpoint name to endpoint descriptors

tags.description: Capability tags indexed with trigram search in the provider registry

capabilities.description: Optional protocol features this provider supports

regions.description: IATA airport codes or UN/LOCODE identifiers for regions where this provider has infrastructure (e.g. ['IAD', 'AMS']). Used by agents to select the nearest provider.

latency_hints.description: Provider-declared p50 latency in milliseconds per region code. Keys must be a subset of 'regions'. Example: { 'IAD': 14, 'AMS': 22 }.

signature.description: Base64 Ed25519 signature (payee keypair) over the SHA-256 hash of this manifest with the signature field omitted. Clients must verify before trusting any routing field.

categories.description: Optional hierarchical categories from a published taxonomy (e.g. data/price/crypto)

PricingConfig.description: Per-request pricing for x402 or mpp-charge modes

amount.description: Cost per request in the payment asset (decimal string, e.g. '0.001')

per.description: Billing unit — always 'request' for non-session modes

facilitator.description: x402 facilitator URL (required for x402 mode). OpenZeppelin Channels endpoint.

payee.description: Optional per-mode payee override (Stellar G... address). Directs settlements for this mode to a separate account for treasury separation. Falls back to the top-level 'payee' when omitted.

rate.description: Cost per voucher in the payment asset (decimal string, e.g. '0.0001')

per.description: Billing unit — always 'voucher' for session mode

channel_factory.description: Stable Soroban factory address (C...) used to deploy a per-session channel

min_deposit.description: Minimum initial deposit to open a channel (decimal string)

refund_waiting_period_ledgers.description: Ledgers the server has to settle before the funder can reclaim. Default: 17280 (~24h). Do not reduce in production.

SLAConfig.description: Service Level Agreement for the provider

uptime_30d_percent.description: Uptime percentage over the last 30 days

cron.description: Cron expression for the maintenance window

duration_minutes.description: Duration of the maintenance window in minutes

request_schema.description: JSON schema for the request body

response_schema.description: JSON schema for the response body
